label: Vehicle fleet composition and emission factors

fleet_composition.description: Approximate UK vehicle fleet mix. TAG Data Book provides detailed year-by-year projections.

cars.note: BEV share growing rapidly. TAG projections show ~30% BEV by 2030.

hgv.note: Heavy vehicles decarbonising slower than cars

car_gCO2_per_km.note: Tailpipe only. Lifecycle/well-to-wheel adds ~20% for ICE, ~50gCO2/km for BEV (grid average)

rail.note: Load factor, not absolute count. Varies hugely by route and time.

fuel_prices.note: Retail prices including duty and VAT. TAG provides duty-exclusive and resource cost variants.

source.publication: TAG Data Book v2.02, Sections A1.3 (fleet) and A3 (emissions)

caveats: Fleet composition changes rapidly due to ZEV mandate and EV uptake
These are snapshot values. TAG Data Book provides year-by-year projections to 2060
Emission factors are tailpipe only unless stated otherwise
